# UI/UX Keywords Reference

## Component Keywords

| Category | Terms |
|----------|-------|
| Navigation | sticky nav bar, breadcrumbs, sidebar, tabs, dropdown, hamburger menu |
| Content | hero section, card grid, modal dialog, accordion, carousel |
| Forms | input field, dropdown select, toggle switch, search bar, date picker |
| Buttons | primary CTA, secondary button, ghost button, icon button, FAB |
| Feedback | toast notification, alert banner, skeleton loader, progress bar |
| Layout | sidebar layout, split view, sticky header, max-width container |

## Atmosphere Adjectives

| Vibe | Keywords |
|------|----------|
| Minimal | clean, uncluttered, generous whitespace, understated |
| Professional | sophisticated, polished, structured, subtle shadows |
| Dark | high-contrast accents, deep backgrounds, soft glows |
| Playful | vibrant, rounded, bold accent colors, approachable |
| Premium | elegant, spacious, fine lines, curated |

## Shape & Radius

| Description | CSS equivalent |
|-------------|----------------|
| Sharp edges | `rounded-none` |
| Slightly soft | `rounded-sm` / `rounded-md` |
| Generously rounded | `rounded-lg` / `rounded-xl` |
| Pill-shaped | `rounded-full` |
